name: Typesense
description: Typesense is an open-source, typo-tolerant search engine optimized for instant search experiences. The API lets you create collections, index and search documents, manage synonyms, curations, API keys, analytics rules, stopwords, presets, and conversation models.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: List all collections in the Typesense cluster.

capabilities.name: collections_create
capabilities.description: Create a new collection with a defined schema of fields and types.

capabilities.name: collections_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific collection including its schema and document count.

capabilities.name: collections_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing collection's schema by adding or modifying fields.

capabilities.name: collections_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently drop a collection and all its documents.

capabilities.name: documents_search
capabilities.description: Search for documents in a collection using text queries, filters, facets, and sorting.

capabilities.name: documents_create
capabilities.description: Index a single document into a collection.

capabilities.name: documents_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single document from a collection by its ID.

capabilities.name: documents_update
capabilities.description: Update a single document in a collection by its ID.

capabilities.name: documents_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a single document from a collection by its ID.

capabilities.name: documents_delete_by_filter
capabilities.description: Delete multiple documents from a collection matching a filter condition.

capabilities.name: documents_update_by_filter
capabilities.description: Update multiple documents matching a filter condition.

capabilities.name: documents_import
capabilities.description: Bulk import documents into a collection using newline-delimited JSON.

capabilities.name: documents_export
capabilities.description: Export all documents from a collection as newline-delimited JSON.

capabilities.name: documents_multi_search
capabilities.description: Send multiple search requests in a single HTTP request for efficiency.

capabilities.name: aliases_list
capabilities.description: List all collection aliases.

capabilities.name: aliases_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a collection alias to point to a specific collection.

capabilities.name: aliases_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific collection alias.

capabilities.name: aliases_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a collection alias.

capabilities.name: synonyms_list
capabilities.description: List all synonym sets.

capabilities.name: synonyms_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a synonym set.

capabilities.name: synonyms_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific synonym set.

capabilities.name: synonyms_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a synonym set.

capabilities.name: synonyms_items_list
capabilities.description: List all items in a synonym set.

capabilities.name: synonyms_items_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a synonym item in a set.

capabilities.name: synonyms_items_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a synonym item from a set.

capabilities.name: curations_list
capabilities.description: List all curation sets for promoting or hiding search results.

capabilities.name: curations_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a curation set to promote or hide specific search results.

capabilities.name: curations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific curation set.

capabilities.name: curations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a curation set.

capabilities.name: keys_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata about all API keys.

capabilities.name: keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API key with specific access control rules.

capabilities.name: keys_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata about a specific API key.

capabilities.name: keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an API key.

capabilities.name: analytics_events_create
capabilities.description: Submit an analytics event such as a click or conversion.

capabilities.name: analytics_rules_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all analytics rules.

capabilities.name: analytics_rules_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update an analytics rule for tracking search events.

capabilities.name: analytics_rules_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an analytics rule.

capabilities.name: stopwords_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all stopwords sets.

capabilities.name: stopwords_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a stopwords set.

capabilities.name: stopwords_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific stopwords set.

capabilities.name: stopwords_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a stopwords set.

capabilities.name: presets_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all saved search presets.

capabilities.name: presets_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a search preset with saved search parameters.

capabilities.name: presets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific search preset.

capabilities.name: presets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a search preset.

capabilities.name: conversation_models_list
capabilities.description: List all RAG conversation models.

capabilities.name: conversation_models_create
capabilities.description: Create a new RAG conversation model for question-answering over collections.

capabilities.name: conversation_models_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing conversation model.

capabilities.name: conversation_models_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a conversation model.

capabilities.name: health_check
capabilities.description: Check if the Typesense server is ready to accept requests.

capabilities.name: debug_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve debugging information about the Typesense server.

capabilities.name: operations_snapshot
capabilities.description: Create a point-in-time snapshot of the Typesense node's state and data.

capabilities.name: operations_vote
capabilities.description: Trigger a follower node to initiate raft voting for leader re-election.

capabilities.name: operations_cache_clear
capabilities.description: Clear the cached responses of search requests in the LRU cache.

capabilities.name: metrics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve server metrics including RAM, CPU, disk, and network usage.
